reviews.review_description: I played this game like 6-8 months ago and the messages are still so sad, the board says that you caused his SUICIDE? I hope the creator is ok we all are here for you we love you please be ok, I saw things about a guy telling someone to keep cutting themselves. Absolutely upsetting and upsurd, hope ur ok man 😭
I see this so sad and heartbreaking. I love the game in general, but the messages around spawn, hit me hard. If you are seeing this creator and still alive. I wish you the best in life, Goodbye 😞.

No cuz when i went into the i feel like i witnessed a suic*de dude like its just sad seeing the messages like i hope is owner is alright man :( but tbh i just hope he deserves better but he was also talking about how some person lied but idk what they lied about and some person he hates but idk what that person did but tbh i really hope the owner is ok cuz he deserves bettet man :(
There's really depressing and unsettling texts around the map, it's kinda sad. I hope the creator is okay.
Yo during my adventure with I and my friend we see depressing stuff like bro what happened to ts game please get rid of it and how r u gon put stuff like this if barely anyone plays it
So me and my friend wanted to try out the game and we saw some concerning messages and I hope that you are okay and that your doing well now
Its an amazing game so much work for like... 1 person online... that's me rn. But this game is better than most gtag fan games!!! I hope this gets popular man!
ts game is so good that a white tear ran down my leg
Really good game, but i hope the owner is okay
